mapper.select: select * from xhbs_points_rule where scene_code = #{sceneCode} and direction = 'ADD' and trigger_mode = 'AUTO' and trigger_event = #{triggerEvent} and status = 'ENABLED' and is_deleted = 0 and (effective_from is null or effective_from <= now()) and (effective_to is null or effective_to >= now()) and (dept_ids is null or json_length(dept_ids) = 0 or (#{deptId} is not null and json_contains(dept_ids, cast(#{deptId} as json)))) and (card_type_ids is null or json_length(card_type_ids) = 0 or (#{cardTypeId} is not null and json_contains(card_type_ids, cast(#{cardTypeId} as json)))) order by effective_from desc, id desc limit 1 for update
mapper.update: update xhbs_points_rule set used_count = used_count + 1, used_points = used_points + case when direction = 'ADD' then #{points} else 0 end, lock_version = lock_version + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{ruleId} and status = 'ENABLED' and (total_limit is null or used_count < total_limit) and (direction <> 'ADD' or budget_points is null or used_points + #{points} <= budget_points)
mapper.sql: ((calculation_mode = 'FIXED' and fixed_points is not null and fixed_points > 0) or (calculation_mode in ('PER_ITEM', 'PER_YUAN') and points_per_unit is not null and points_per_unit > 0)) and trigger_mode = 'MANUAL' and status = 'ENABLED' and is_deleted = 0 and (effective_from is null or effective_from <= now()) and (effective_to is null or effective_to >= now()) and (dept_ids is null or json_length(dept_ids) = 0 or (#{deptId} is not null and json_contains(dept_ids, cast(#{deptId} as json)))) and (card_type_ids is null or json_length(card_type_ids) = 0 or (#{cardTypeId} is not null and json_contains(card_type_ids, cast(#{cardTypeId} as json))))
mapper.select: select * from xhbs_points_rule where and direction = #{direction} and (total_limit is null or used_count < total_limit) and (direction <> 'ADD' or budget_points is null or used_points + coalesce(fixed_points, points_per_unit) <= budget_points) order by sort_order asc, id asc
select * from xhbs_points_rule where and id = #{ruleId} limit 1 for update
select * from xhbs_points_rule where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select * from xhbs_points_rule where rule_code = #{ruleCode} and status = 'ENABLED' and is_deleted = 0 and (effective_from is null or effective_from <= now()) and (effective_to is null or effective_to >= now()) and (dept_ids is null or json_length(dept_ids) = 0 or (#{deptId} is not null and json_contains(dept_ids, cast(#{deptId} as json)))) and (card_type_ids is null or json_length(card_type_ids) = 0 or (#{cardTypeId} is not null and json_contains(card_type_ids, cast(#{cardTypeId} as json)))) limit 1 for update
mapper.insert: insert into xhbs_points_rule ( rule_code, rule_name, scene_code, rule_source, implementation_status, direction, trigger_mode, trigger_event, calculation_mode, fixed_points, points_per_unit, unit_type, manual_points_editable, member_day_enabled, member_day_days, member_day_multiplier, effective_from, effective_to, member_limit, total_limit, budget_points, max_points_per_order, require_biz_order, require_evidence, exclude_bulk_purchase, freeze_days, status, sort_order, remark, operator_user_id, operator_name, operation_time ) values ( #{ruleCode}, #{ruleName}, #{sceneCode}, #{ruleSource}, #{implementationStatus}, #{direction}, #{triggerMode}, #{triggerEvent}, #{calculationMode}, #{fixedPoints}, #{pointsPerUnit}, #{unitType}, #{manualPointsEditable}, #{memberDayEnabled}, #{memberDayDays}, #{memberDayMultiplier}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{memberLimit}, #{totalLimit}, #{budgetPoints}, #{maxPointsPerOrder}, #{requireBizOrder}, #{requireEvidence}, #{excludeBulkPurchase}, #{freezeDays}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{remark}, #{operatorUserId}, #{operatorName}, now() )
mapper.update: update xhbs_points_rule set rule_name = #{ruleName}, scene_code = #{sceneCode}, rule_source = #{ruleSource}, implementation_status = #{implementationStatus}, direction = #{direction}, trigger_mode = #{triggerMode}, trigger_event = #{triggerEvent}, calculation_mode = #{calculationMode}, fixed_points = #{fixedPoints}, points_per_unit = #{pointsPerUnit}, unit_type = #{unitType}, manual_points_editable = #{manualPointsEditable}, member_day_enabled = #{memberDayEnabled}, member_day_days = #{memberDayDays}, member_day_multiplier = #{memberDayMultiplier}, effective_from = #{effectiveFrom}, effective_to = #{effectiveTo}, member_limit = #{memberLimit}, total_limit = #{totalLimit}, budget_points = #{budgetPoints}, max_points_per_order = #{maxPointsPerOrder}, require_biz_order = #{requireBizOrder}, require_evidence = #{requireEvidence}, exclude_bulk_purchase = #{excludeBulkPurchase}, freeze_days = #{freezeDays}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, remark = #{remark}, operator_user_id = #{operatorUserId}, operator_name = #{operatorName}, operation_time = now(), lock_version = lock_version + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from xhbs_points_order where rule_id = #{ruleId}
mapper.update: update xhbs_points_rule set is_deleted = 1, status = 'DISABLED', operator_user_id = #{operatorUserId}, operator_name = #{operatorName}, operation_time = now(), lock_version = lock_version + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

update xhbs_points_rule set fixed_points = #{fixedPoints}, points_per_unit = #{pointsPerUnit}, operator_user_id = #{operatorUserId}, operator_name = #{operatorName}, operation_time = now(), lock_version = lock_version + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
